faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Little Neck?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day wasp removal service throughout Little Neck. Most wasp nest eliminations are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest location and size. We understand wasp emergencies require immediate attention, especially during summer months when activity peaks.

faqs.question: What's included in your $350-$550 wasp removal service?
faqs.answer: Our flat-rate pricing includes complete property inspection, identification of all wasp nests, safe removal using professional-grade products, nest disposal, and preventative treatment to deter future infestations. We also provide a service guarantee and follow-up inspection if needed.

faqs.question: Are wasp nests common in Little Neck homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, Little Neck's tree-filled neighborhoods and older homes with accessible eaves, soffits, and attics make it particularly attractive to wasps. We frequently remove nests from garage areas, deck overhangs, and yard structures throughout the community, especially from May through October.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and proven safety protocols to eliminate wasps while protecting your loved ones. Our technicians wear protective gear, establish safety perimeters during treatment, and provide clear instructions for re-entry. Pets and family members can typically return to treated areas within 2-4 hours.
